== Notes for [[Item:Q79442|Q79442]] ==

'''Afranius Hannibalianus''' (fl. 3rd century) was a Roman senator and military officer who was appointed consul in AD 292.

Ancestry unknown but perhaps a son of [https://www.geni.com/people/Afranius/6000000005747744069 Afranius].

Marriage - perhaps Eutropia Empress of the West

Children - -  Flavia Maximiana Theodora Empress of the West

Forrás / Source:

* http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Afranius_Hannibalianus

FLAVIUS AFRIANUS (L) HANNIBALIANUS

Downloaded from the Bruce Cooley Pusch RootsWeb site. Please remove the symbols I've inserted in many of the names like (L),(P) and(BCP). Also please delete the (NOTES)I've written in some entries in the first person, the notes that refer just to me.

POSSIBLY OF ASIAN DESCENT

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
